summary: Plan-mode PR inventory classification only. No GitHub mutations, merge, fix, or close actions are recommended. Open non-security PRs are kept for normal maintainer/review flow; already-closed non-security PRs are skipped as closed; security-sensitive listed PRs are quarantined with route_security.

actions.reason: Open, non-security PR with useful but broad work and unresolved merge readiness questions; keep it in normal PR review rather than close or merge from this inventory shard.
